name: mistle-tools
description: Provider-focused CLIs and future skills for Mistle.

scripts.lint: bun run lint:oxlint && bun run lint:spelling && bun run lint:knip && bun run lint:jscpd
scripts.lint:spelling: typos AGENTS.md README.md LICENSE lefthook.yml .changeset .commitlintrc.json .lintstagedrc.json .oxfmtrc.json .oxlintrc.json .jscpd.json knip.jsonc mise.toml package.json tsconfig.base.json turbo.json packages/core/package.json packages/core/src packages/core/vitest.config.ts packages/core/tsconfig.json packages/jira/package.json packages/jira/src packages/jira/vitest.config.ts packages/jira/tsconfig.json
scripts.prepare: bun -e "if (!(Bun.env.CI || Bun.env.LEFTHOOK === '0')) { const inside = Bun.spawnSync(['git', 'rev-parse', '--is-inside-work-tree']); if (inside.exitCode === 0) { const install = Bun.spawnSync(['bunx', 'lefthook', 'install'], { stderr: 'inherit', stdin: 'inherit', stdout: 'inherit' }); if (install.exitCode !== 0) process.exit(install.exitCode); } }"
